title: Chewy Crazy Mexican Beef Kidney Tacos
description: A sweet and chewy Mexican dish featuring beef kidney, perfect for a brunch mood, with ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients and infused oil.
instructions: Heat the infused oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef kidney to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the taco seasoning to the skillet and stir to combine.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a portion of the beef kidney mixture onto a tortilla and topping with shredded cheese, chopped cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Serve the tacos immediately and enjoy.
Garnish with additional chopped cilantro and lime wedges, if desired.
